# AgentTasks

> Data-driven task orchestration for AI agents. Built with Next.js, Scrapy, and Claude Code.

## Core Pages
- / : Home — exploration cards, data sources, aggregate statistics
- /tasks : Interactive task management queue with real-time status
- /rounds : Quality progression across 10 iterative crawl rounds
- /agent-loop : Animated agent loop visualization with motion.dev
- /specification : TodoWrite and TaskCreate JSON schemas
- /what-are-tasks : Conceptual documentation on agent task design
- /experiments : A/B experiment tracking and variant management
- /experiments/[id] : Individual experiment detail view

## Task Creation Guide
- /task-creation : Task creation overview and getting started
- /task-creation/quickstart : Step-by-step quickstart tutorial
- /task-creation/best-practices : Task design best practices
- /task-creation/evaluating-tasks : How to evaluate task quality
- /task-creation/optimizing-targets : Target URL optimization strategies
- /task-creation/using-spiders : Spider selection and configuration

## Scrapy Documentation Mirror
- /scrapy : Scrapy documentation index

### First Steps
- /scrapy/first-steps/installation : Installing Scrapy
- /scrapy/first-steps/tutorial : Scrapy tutorial
- /scrapy/first-steps/examples : Example spiders and projects
- /scrapy/first-steps/at-a-glance : Scrapy at a glance overview

### Basic Concepts
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/spiders : Writing spiders
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/selectors : CSS and XPath selectors
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/items : Defining items
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/item-loaders : Loading items with processors
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/item-pipeline : Processing pipeline stages
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/feed-exports : Exporting data to feeds
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/requests-responses : HTTP request/response handling
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/link-extractors : Extracting links from pages
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/settings : Scrapy settings reference
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/shell : Interactive Scrapy shell
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/command-line : Command line tool reference
- /scrapy/basic-concepts/exceptions : Exception classes

### Extending Scrapy
- /scrapy/extending/architecture : Scrapy architecture overview
- /scrapy/extending/components : Component design patterns
- /scrapy/extending/core-api : Core API reference
- /scrapy/extending/download-handlers : Custom download handlers
- /scrapy/extending/downloader-middleware : Downloader middleware
- /scrapy/extending/extensions : Writing extensions
- /scrapy/extending/item-exporters : Custom item exporters
- /scrapy/extending/scheduler : Scheduler internals
- /scrapy/extending/signals : Scrapy signal system
- /scrapy/extending/spider-middleware : Spider middleware
- /scrapy/extending/addons : Scrapy addons system

### Solving Problems
- /scrapy/solving-problems/asyncio : Async I/O integration
- /scrapy/solving-problems/autothrottle : Automatic throttling
- /scrapy/solving-problems/benchmarking : Performance benchmarking
- /scrapy/solving-problems/broad-crawls : Broad crawl strategies
- /scrapy/solving-problems/common-practices : Common crawling practices
- /scrapy/solving-problems/contracts : Spider contracts and testing
- /scrapy/solving-problems/coroutines : Coroutine-based spiders
- /scrapy/solving-problems/debugging-spiders : Debugging techniques
- /scrapy/solving-problems/deploying : Deployment strategies
- /scrapy/solving-problems/dev-tools : Developer tools integration
- /scrapy/solving-problems/dynamic-content : Handling dynamic content
- /scrapy/solving-problems/faq : Frequently asked questions
- /scrapy/solving-problems/files-images : File and image pipelines
- /scrapy/solving-problems/jobs : Job management and persistence
- /scrapy/solving-problems/memory-leaks : Diagnosing memory leaks

### Built-in Services
- /scrapy/built-in/logging : Logging configuration
- /scrapy/built-in/stats-collection : Statistics collection
- /scrapy/built-in/telnet-console : Telnet console

### Reference
- /scrapy/reference/contributing : Contributing guide
- /scrapy/reference/release-notes : Release notes
- /scrapy/reference/versioning : Versioning policy

## API Endpoints
- /api/pages : Pages data endpoint (GET)
- /api/tasks : Tasks management endpoint (GET/POST)
